The '''Fellowship of Kooroo''' was a religion based on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Qalydon/Legends|Qalydon]], led by the being known as [[Kooroo (being)|Kooroo]]. Believers congregated at the ancient structures called the [[Shrine of Kooroo|Shrines of Kooroo]], built in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]] possibly more than 20,000 years before the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

==History==
Members of the Fellowship traveled on pilgrimages to the shrines in every part of the Outer Rim. They claimed that archaeological research on the sites threatened the mystical peace found there. The constant chant of Fellowship pilgrims was "The way of Kooroo is the way to peace." They burned incense during their ceremonies.

[[File:Shrine_of_Kooroo.jpg|thumb|left|200px|The Shrine of Kooroo on [[Gelgelar/Legends|Gelgelar]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].]]

While the Fellowship appeared not long before the fall of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Old Republic]], it grew out of popular beliefs regarding the sites, involving telepathic and other, possibly [[The Force/Legends|Force-based]] [[Force power/Legends|powers]]. While the religion appeared benign, rumors linked the Shrines to blood sacrifices and obscene rituals. Inconsistent accounts also dated the Fellowship to much older eras.

Few members knew anything about the religion's origins. They believed that their rites encouraged [[Telepathy/Legends|telepathic]] powers in their members, though this appeared to be unfounded. It also appeared that the majority of priests in the group were frauds. The [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] discouraged the faith because of its potential link to the Force.

The planet Qalydon, seat of the sect, was also linked to the [[New Sith Wars]], a conflict sometimes referred to as the "Curse of Qalydon".<ref name="END">{{Hyperspace|url=hyperspace/member/insideronline/88/indexp2.html|text=''Evil Never Dies: The Sith Dynasties''|int=Evil Never Dies: The Sith Dynasties}}</ref>

[[Platt Okeefe/Legends|Platt Okeefe]] once stated that she dressed herself in the blue robes of a pilgrim to escape the Empire and [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunters]]. In [[11 ABY/Legends|11 ABY]], [[Henrietya Antilles|Corellia Antilles]] presented a report to the [[Galactic Museum/Legends|Galactic Museum]] on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] on the Shrines, and hinted that the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] considered the Fellowship "unpredictable" and a possible threat.
